---
title: "groupproj"
author: "Kylie H"
date: "2026-03-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\kylie\\Desktop\\512 group proj\\crime_data_with_poverty_tiers.csv")
police <-data$LemasPctPolicOnPatr
crime <- data$totalCrimesPerPop
unemployment <- data$PctUnemployed
poverty <- data$PctPopUnderPov
longpoverty <- data$LongRunPovertyRate

full_model <- lm(crime ~ police + unemployment + longpoverty + poverty, data = data)
reduced_model <- lm(crime ~ unemployment + longpoverty + poverty, data = data)

#cor(data[sapply(data, is.numeric)])

#checkpt 3 work
model <- lm(crime ~ poverty + unemployment + police + longpoverty, data = data)

#check outliers
rstandard_vals <- rstandard(model)
rstudent_vals  <- rstudent(model)
which(abs(rstudent_vals) > 2)
which(abs(rstudent_vals) > 3) 

plot(model, which = 2)  # Q-Q
plot(model, which = 1)  # Resid v fitted

#leverage 
lev <- hatvalues(model)
n <- nrow(data)
p <- length(coef(model))
lev_cutoff <- 2 * p / n 
which(lev > lev_cutoff)

#cooks
cooks <- cooks.distance(model)
which(cooks > (4 / n))
plot(cooks, type = "h")
abline(h = 4/n, col = "red")

rstudent_vals <- rstudent(model)
lev <- hatvalues(model)
cooks <- cooks.distance(model)

diagnostics <- data.frame(
  residual = rstudent_vals,
  leverage = lev,
  cooks = cooks
)

data2 = data[-c(6,61),]
model2 <- lm(crime ~ poverty + unemployment + police + longpoverty, data = data2)

model_data <- model$model

bad_rows <- c(6, 61)

model_data2 <- model_data[-bad_rows, ]
model_new <- lm(crime ~ poverty + unemployment + police + longpoverty,
                data = model_data2)

```
